name: LAMMPS On Slurm
summary: Run LAMMPS molecular dynamics jobs on Slurm with MPI, GPU, and restart planning.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm pattern for LAMMPS jobs, including MPI task layout, optional GPU/KOKKOS notes, restart and log controls, and a dry-run-first Lennard-Jones smoke test.

tools.name: lmp
tools.notes: Common LAMMPS executable name; sites may use lmp_mpi, lammps, or module wrappers.

inputs.name: input_script
inputs.description: LAMMPS input script such as in.lj.

inputs.name: lammps_executable
inputs.description: LAMMPS executable or wrapper command available in the job environment.

inputs.name: nodes
inputs.description: Number of Slurm nodes to request.

inputs.name: ntasks
inputs.description: Total MPI ranks or Slurm tasks for the run.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Durable output directory for logs, restart files, and run records.

outputs.name: lammps_launch_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable Slurm, MPI, executable, input, log, and restart plan.

outputs.name: lammps_log
outputs.description: LAMMPS log file captured with a deterministic path.

outputs.name: restart_files
outputs.description: Optional restart files generated by the LAMMPS input script.

examples.title: Plan or run a LAMMPS smoke test on Slurm

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run plan-only mode first, then set RUN_LAMMPS=1 on a short debug partition with a site-approved LAMMPS executable.
